feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issue while loading maintenance order using LTMC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can anyone help on the below mwntioned issue.

While loading maintenance order using the LTMC template getting the error operation 0010, created by the system, adapted. This is only happening for Reactive Order Type (YA01)

Any help will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit error creating Customers when assigning ship-to to Soldt-to.
entry.content:
No matter what I try I do not seem to be able to get around the error which appears when loading Customers. 

When simulating, the Customers without Ship-to partners seem error free, but any Sold-to Customers having Ship-to partners assigned seem to produce an error, being "Entry XXXXXXXXXX does not exist in KNA1 (check entry)", even though the shipTo Partner/Customer appears in the 'General_data' worksheet of the Customer Template. 

Has anyone else encountered this issue and overcome it? 

I could remove all the shipto's from the Template, and use another object to extend to the ShipTo partners for the SoldTo customer, but I am sure I have tried this previously, and it objects to do this. 

Best regards

entry.title: LTMC error during customer master upload
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Getting error below error when trying to upload customer master using LTMC. Can you help in understanding & rectifying error. We tried to upload in same format yesterday which got uploaded sucessfully but today it is throwing error. Pls suggest

There are no instances that can be processed at this time 

Message Class:
CNV_DMC_SIN_MIG_INFO
Message Number:
7
 
 SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit

entry.title: How Are Staging Tables Created in SAP Data Migration Cockpit (DMC)? in Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am currently working on SAP Data Migration Cockpit (DMC) and trying to understand how staging tables and temporary storage structures are created in the system. While I am aware that staging tables are automatically generated when a migration object is activated in LTMOM (Migration Object Modeler), I would like to gain a deeper understanding of the underlying logic and process.

  •    I have observed that staging tables typically follow the /1LT/<6-digit object ID> pattern

Specific Question:

How does SAP determine the structure of a staging table?

  • What fields are considered, and how does SAP map them from source to target?

    • Where exactly are these tables stored in the HANA database?  

    • Is there a way to manually create or modify staging table structures? Are there specific rules for defining primary keys or mandatory fields

    • What is the reference objects SAP is considering for creating the staging tables?   

Any insights, documentation references, or practical experiences on this topic would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help.

Best regards,

entry.title: Migrate your data for make to order sales orders
entry.content:
We have activated the Migrate you data Fiori app to migrate Open Sales orders.  We need to be able to pass the configured options for a make to order material.  How do we upload the options (characteristics) in the templated.  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migrate your data through Migration cockpit.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

We are currently utilizing the data migration cockpit template for BP vendor creation and have encountered an issue during the simulation phase. The error message displayed is: "Enter External Number" (Message no: CVIV_UI 6).
In our existing system, we follow a different number range concept, as outlined below:

 

Account Group: XXXX

 

BP Number Range: Internal    NR(XXXX)

 

Vendor Number Range: External NR(XXXX)

 

Additionally, there is no checkbox available for maintaining the same numbers.
Could you please advise whether the migration cockpit is designed to work exclusively with the same number range, or if it can accommodate different number ranges as well?Your guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Synchronize Staging Tables getting failed for specific migration object in non-modifiable system
entry.content:
Dear All,

Synchronize Staging Tables getting failed for specific migration object ( Product, test for code split) in non-modifiable system. We are unable to unassign background job from this migration object and sync activity running continuously. 

When we are trying to migrate the date, getting error "Another activity is in process for this project. Try again". Please refer to the attached screen shot.
Please suggest me work around to stop the migration sync for the failed object which is running continuously.

Thanks!
Satya Praveen

entry.title: Contact person role BUP001 not populated using Customer object in LTMC
entry.content:
Hello,

I am creating contact person for BP customer using LTMC object customer. The contact person is created for BP but role BUP001 has not assigned to contact person.

Is there any way to achieve this functionality using Customer or Customer extension template??

We want customer with role FLCU00 & FLCU01 role and contact person with BUP001 role.

Thankyou in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Garima

entry.title: SAP NOTES Not Cleared in SPAU
entry.content: We currently doing a migration from ECC to S/4 HANA 2023.IN SPAU phase there is a small list SAP notes which are either absolute or completely implemented.But they are not getting cleared from SPAU screen even after multiple try .So please suggest anyone.

entry.title: SAP Dealer Business Management Road map to ECC to S4 Hana migration
entry.content:
Hi All,

I just want to know what the steps or guidelines involved are while migrating the system from ECC to S4HANA for SAP SD & DBM (dealer business management). If anyone has any notes for SAP DBM (Dealer Business Management), please share them to my email ID: pavanm5353@gmail.com

 

Regards,

Pavan Kumar M

entry.title: Guidance Required on Deletion or Retention of Component DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 During Upgrade
entry.content:
During planning an upgrade project for SAP system you have identified that the component DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 is installed in your landscape. As part of the upgrade, you want to confirm whether this component can be safely deleted or should be retained.

  1. Whether DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 is still required for the upgraded system?

  2. If it is obsolete or deprecated, what is the recommended procedure for safely removing it?

  3. If it must be retained, are there any prerequisites or compatibility notes we should be aware of?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4 - Migration - Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello All - 

for planning the migration of custom code from ECC to S4 , ( Fiori Migration app need to be always run on S4 as backend system? 

or if we have run the readiness check in the ECC using ATC (ABAP TEST COCKPIT) , can the zip file be uploaded directly ? 

 

thanks 

aakash

entry.title: Data Migration material master data in japanese test environment error
entry.content:
we want migration the material master data to public cloud , but we found almost same data , when we use the english format the migration will be success , but when we use the japanese format the migration will be failed .

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

1 login  (Migration Projects ) 移行コックピット  and change the setting inb japanese .

2 create and select Migrate Data Using Staging Tables.

3 enter the project name : xxxx-test .

4 click step 2 , and enter the key word product , if use the japanese , pls use the key word as '製品'。 and select product .

5 and move product to Selected Migration Objects and click review .

6 select do not add .and create project .

7 back to the the Migration Projects  first page , log in the project : xxxx-test .

8 download the format as XML file .

9 the in put the data on the japanese format and english format.

10 the upload the format .

11 at this time we found at english environment we migration the data was success , but at japanese environment was failed .

entry.title: S4 HANA "Profit Center" in line item 0o1 not filled during mid-year legacy asset transfer
entry.content:
When I doing mid-year legacy asset transfer, there always have a error message Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 0o1 not filled . 

* Specify Account Assignment Types for Account Assignment Objects  already configured.

entry.title: Can we use migration cockpit to change the fixed asset master data
entry.content:
Can we update Fixed asset master data using 'Migrate your data' Fiori app(Migration cockpit)

is there any migration objects available to update or change the fixed asset master data through Migration cockpit

entry.title: Valuation area 5000 is already productive in the material ledgerMessage No. C+338
entry.content:
While trying to delete the plant in OX18 to deactivate Material Ledger (ML), I am encountering an error. Please help me with this issue.

Valuation area 5000 is already productive in the material ledger

Message No. C+338

Diagnosis

You are attempting to change the currency settings and valuation settings for valuation area 5000.  The Material Ledger is already productive for valuation area 5000.

System Response

To guarantee the consitency of your valuation data, this change is not allowed.

entry.title: How to move direct transfer Migration Projects (Fiori app Migration Cockpit) to other systems?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We're using direct transfer Migration Objects in our Migration Cockpit and would like to transport them not only between clients, but also between systems/to higher environments. For instance: from Development to Quality.

Based on the official documentation, we successfully transported such objects between different clients (using transaction STMS), but we'd also like to confirm something else:

  • Is the transport functionality the correct option to move direct transfer Migration Objects to higher environments/systems, as Quality/Test? Or is there an alternative approach available?

We're using an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, 2023, FPS 01.

Thanks!

Best regards,
Data migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: Error AM 215 - Country changing inexplicably when extending BP with new role
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am trying to extend a Business Partner that currently is just a supplier with the role "goods recipient" via the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit.

For this, I am using the Migrationobject "Customer - extend existing record by new org levels" aka. CUST_EXT_3 as the new role is for customers and SD Data is meant to be added to the BP.

In the downloaded template for the migration, only the general, BP role and sales data tabs are filled with no addresses whatsoever. Simply the BP identifier, run_id, bp_role and sales data such as the sales organizations, the distribution channels and divisions.

There are no problems when mapping. All values are found/correct and even when testing to set the additional address to the correct country and region (Sweden, Region 19), it still sets the country to be Germany.

The problem occurs when I simulate. Instead of the existing country being kept, since no new address is being inserted via the excel template, it randomly inserts a different country.

In my current case, I have a business partner with only the general and supplier role with an address in the country of Schweden (SE) and Region 019. However, the simulation throws the error message AM 215 (2015043 - [VIDEO] "E AM 215: Region "X" is not defined for country "X" - SAP for Me, or see picture below) showing that apparently the country has changed to Germany (DE) for whatever reason.

The weird thing is that this sort of migration has worked before, but is now throwing this error a few months later when needed to adjust some business partners again.

Input of migration: BP (general + supplier) with Address in Sweden Region 019 (no address change as input).

Output error of simulation: AM 215 "Region 019 is not defined for Germany".

 

Tried ideas:

  • Looked into customizing to see if Schweden has Region 019 defined (it does)
  • Looked into LTMOM in case anything has been changed (it says unchanged)
  • Tried inserting the country, region and language via the additional addresses tab in the excel template to see if that helps (doesn't seem to do anything, makes sense)
  • Looked at the staging tables to see if the data there is correct (it is, nothing about the country though as it's not meant to be inserted and simply inherited by the existing address data since it's the same fields as far as I am aware)
  • Tried removing the sales data from the excel (didn't seem to do anything)
  • Looked into SAP Notes on me.sap.com (couldn't find anything useful it seems)

 

Any help or ideas as to what to try would be appreciated!

Kind Regards

entry.title: How to debug data migrations in the Migration Cockpit?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We have created a custom Migration Object for usage in the Migration Cockpit (based on the object Supplier), and its simulations were successful. When we tried to migrate it though, some unexpected errors were thrown, and we'd like to debug such migrations in the future to avoid similar issues. We checked the KBAs 3047880 and 3059453, but they only mention debugging data simulations.

Considering this, could you inform us:

  • How to debug migrations (instead of simulations) performed using the Migration Cockpit?

Our system is an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. Thanks!

Best regards,
Data migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to assign Contact Person - Partner in already migrated Customer(using LTMC)?
entry.content:
We have loaded Customer master using Migrate your data including Sales area and Sales partner data. Next, we created Contact person BP and assigned relationship with Customer. Now when we are trying to load that Contact person as Sales partner with Partner Role CP/AP using Customer - Extension by org level template of LTMC, it is now allowing us to load it. Throwing obvious error as Sales area already available in target system. 

Is there any way with which we can load Contact person as a Sales partner in S/4 system?

TIA
